name: skills
description: Small, focused Claude Code skills: prose linting (slop-cop), second opinions (codex), repo scaffolding (repo-bootstrap), image generation (gen-image), GitHub profile READMEs (gh-profile), Claude-maintained summaries sidecars (repo-summaries), animated CLI demos (cli-demo), and authenticated browser sessions (agent-browser-with-cookies).

plugins.name: slop-cop
plugins.description: Run slop-cop on a file to catch LLM-generated prose tells.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from OpenAI Codex CLI on hard debugging, analysis, or architecture problems, or generate images with its $imagegen skill.

plugins.name: repo-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap new projects and repos with base conventions plus an opinionated Python packaging layer.

plugins.name: llm-prompts
plugins.description: Guidance for writing effective LLM prompts and agent instructions, with current per-provider model notes.

plugins.name: writing-docs
plugins.description: Apply Diataxis modes, a technical-builder voice, and a slop-cop prose-lint pass when writing project documentation, READMEs, tutorials, how-tos, or reference.

plugins.name: gen-image
plugins.description: Generate project images — mascot logos, README banners (dark/light), social cards, illustrations — via the OpenAI Images API with local under-1MiB compression.

plugins.name: gh-profile
plugins.description: Create or refresh a fancy GitHub profile README from your real repos and activity — AI banner, snake animation, cron Actions, and a daily Claude refresh that summarizes recent commits and releases.

plugins.name: repo-summaries
plugins.description: Maintain a Claude-written summaries sidecar in any repo — a committed read-side module plus a config-driven daily refresh skill that summarizes real commit and release data into one-line suffixes.

plugins.name: cli-demo
plugins.description: Generate animated SVG terminal demos of a CLI with evp — write a .tape, render it (native on Linux x86_64, Docker elsewhere), inspect keyframes, and refine in a loop.

plugins.name: agent-browser-with-cookies
plugins.description: Run authenticated agent-browser sessions by reusing your local browser login — stream cookies for one or more hosts from the local store behind one Touch ID tap (cookiesync CLI), merged into a fresh session. macOS.

plugins.name: cc-context
plugins.description: Compact codebase-context tools — a facade MCP + ccx CLI proxying semble (NL search) and tilth (symbol/outline/diff), with capt-hook enforcement.
